headline: Morgan Stanley quietly buys Bitcoin amid selloff
summary: We have seen a Bitcoin (BTC) sell-off this whole June, and the price is way below $70,000 for the past few days. In the third week of June, we saw momentary spikes of above $67,200 around June 15, but that was about it. As of press time, it's trading around $63,130. But the sell-off ...

headline: The Morgan Stanley 0.14% Fee Sets New Floor in Crypto ETF Fee War
summary: In Bitcoin news today, Russia’s crypto regulation deadline is no longer abstract. On July 1, 2026, the country will formally legalize Bitcoin and stablecoin payments for cross-border trade, the culmination of a two-year pilot that already processed roughly $11Bn in crypto-facilitated commerce last year, according to figures cited by state ...

headline: Morgan Stanley (MS) Stock After 72% One-Year Jump What Do Valuation Models Suggest Now
summary: If you are wondering whether Morgan Stanley at US$223.17 still offers value after a strong run, understanding how it stacks up on different valuation checks is a useful starting point. The stock has recorded returns of 4.9% over the last 7 days, 17.7% over the last 30 days, 22.7% year to date, 72.5% over 1 year, 190.6% over 3 years and 201.1% over 5 years. This naturally raises questions about what is already priced in and how much risk the market currently sees. Recent coverage of Morgan...
